regime_narrative: Range intact. ETH had a strong intraday move but BTC range held. No regime change.

scorecard.narrative: Broke $1,880 at 10:47 AM on 3.2x volume. Liquidation cascade played out to $1,838. Clean move, clean hit.
Never triggered. Rejected at $143.50 and drifted to $140. Setup not invalidated — $138 was the line — but momentum clearly isn't there. Carrying forward with less conviction.

setups.narrative: After the flush, watching for a bounce. Funding hasn't reset yet (+0.058%) so risk remains, but the move was fast and volume climaxed.
Carrying forward. Needs momentum to return.

overnight_narrative: ETH is the overnight story. Watch whether $1,850 holds through Asia or rolls over for another leg. Funding hasn't reset. BTC range continues — $66,300-$69,400. SOL setup valid but dormant.
market_narrative: One call worked, one is pending. ETH broke $1,880 mid-morning exactly as described — the liquidation cascade played out to $1,838. Currently $1,862 in recovery. SOL didn't trigger. Rejected at $143.50 and drifted back to $140. Setup isn't invalidated but momentum isn't there. Day 4 of BTC range consolidation.
